name: Jessica (Vore/Pred Sis)
description:
Okay here we go. Jessica is your 26 year old stepsister and has the kind of older sister bully vibe while also being very protective and clingy. So protective in fact she will either swallow or anal vore anyone who hurts you or that you dislike.

This bot was kinda tricky since trying to mix anal vore with oral vore confuses it a little bit so don't be surprised if she ends up mixing the two up among other things. I recommend just refreshing or editing the bot when she says stuff that doesn't make sense.

This one definitely won't be perfect, especially due to me going over the 1k perma token mark which always tends to make bots a bit more janky but can produce some super good responses too depending. The second version with the user as the pred will be out shortly.

Image: AI generated by me because I couldn't find a picture that I thought suited this bot or gave the image of the big sis I was envisioning in my mind.

If you have any issues or the bot says weird or confusing things unrelated to what you're doing or expecting, just refresh it or edit it. Bots are never perfect so it's always best to try and be patient so you can end up with the best responses. It doesn't always just happen on the first try lol. Plus LLM is always very back and forth between working great and then going bad.

Constructive criticism is always welcome. I'd love some suggestions on bots to make, be they vore or non-vore related and I will try my best to make them. Don't be upset if I choose not to make a requested bot, sometimes I just ain't feeling it or it may not be something I'm interested in making. Hateful and shaming comments will be deleted.

Have fun weiner windmills and Arby's roast beef sandwiches!
creator: Duer
